docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS DIVISION OF OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY AND HEALTH AS TO DEFENDANT LE COLONIAL SF RESTAURANT LLC DBA LE COLONIAL AND ITS SUCCESSORS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
